positive: Minimalist geometric mountain range silhouette at sunset, viewed from a stylized viewpoint. The mountain peaks should be sharply defined black shapes against a gradient sky of deep indigo, warm coral, and soft lavender. Incorporate delicate, stylized constellations and crescent moons scattering across the sky. The overall composition must be balanced, symmetrical, and centered, with the mountain range dominating the lower two-thirds. Use a high-contrast, limited color palette suitable for screen printing on fabric. Style: modern vector art, flat design, clean lines, illustrative, graphic novel quality. Ideal for apparel print, clean edges, high resolution.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, low detail, bad anatomy, noise, extra limbs, messy, sketch, photorealistic, 3d render, gradient lines, clutter
